purpose: Bounded local generated-output proof for the Wave70 mf70_teeth_mouth_area v2 postprocess candidate mask using a v2-specific input filename.

request_patch_values.positive_prompt: preserve exact original identity, neutral expression, closed mouth shape, visible teeth detail, lip shape, philtrum, nose, cheeks, eyes, gaze direction, eyebrows, skin texture, hair, white blazer, lighting, background, and portrait composition unchanged; only microscopic photoreal blending inside the mouth-area mask
request_patch_values.negative_prompt: identity change, different person, expression change, smile change, open mouth, closed teeth removed, added teeth, missing teeth, crooked teeth, warped teeth, tongue, lip mutation, upper lip change, lower lip change, mouth shape change, philtrum mutation, nose mutation, cheek mutation, gaze change, softened eyes, mismatched eyes, skin tone change, visible seam, hair mutation, clothing change, background change, watermark, text

qa_focus: mouth, visible teeth, lips, expression, philtrum, and nose remain natural
no smile/open-mouth drift or tooth mutation
no visible seam around mouth-area mask boundary
do not promote the mask from this single local proof

source_qa_driver.change_summary: Use the gold-benchmark-supported mouth-area v2 candidate with low denoise and a v2-specific input filename to test local routing without overwriting the older active teeth-only mask.
